The best tool is the one that gets out of the way.
State in files, not in memory.
Policy in markdown, not in code.
Durable state survives the session.
Every agent reads from the same truth.
Workflow is the spec. The spec is the workflow.
A well-named file beats a clever abstraction.
The queue never lies.
Agents forget. Files remember.
Reproducibility is just good manners.
The workspace is the source of truth.
Context is everything. Store it.
Automation without observability is just chaos with a scheduler.
Ship the state machine, not the side effects.
If it's not in STATE.yaml, it didn't happen.
Design for the agent that hasn't read the backlog.
Exit criteria before acceptance criteria.
One ticket, one worktree, one truth.
The next session should never guess.
Clarity now saves debugging later.
